title: Figure 1 in Detection of the amoeba Entamoeba gingivalis in periodontal pockets
author: Bonner, Mark
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Small subunit ribosomal RNA sequence comparison for Entamoeba species found in humans. E. gingivalis (Egi), E. coli (Eco), E. dispar (Edi), E. hartmanni (Eha), E. histolytica (Ehi), E. moshkovskii (Emo) and E. polecki (Epo) sequences are displayed. The forward primer used in this study is shaded, the reverse complement sequence to reverse primer is shaded and underlined.
steps_raw: Figure 1. Small subunit ribosomal RNA sequence comparison for Entamoeba species found in humans. E. gingivalis (Egi), E. coli (Eco), E. dispar (Edi), E. hartmanni (Eha), E. histolytica (Ehi), E. moshkovskii (Emo) and E. polecki (Epo) sequences are displayed. The forward primer used in this study is shaded, the reverse complement sequence to reverse primer is shaded and underlined.
